endpoints.name: GET /apis/domains.cloudrun.com/v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Get information about a domain mapping.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /apis/domains.cloudrun.com/v1/{name}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /apis/domains.cloudrun.com/v1/{parent}/authorizeddomains
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /apis/domains.cloudrun.com/v1/{parent}/domainmappings
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /apis/domains.cloudrun.com/v1/{parent}/domainmappings
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /apis/run.googleapis.com/v1/{name}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PUT /apis/run.googleapis.com/v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Replace a job. Only the spec and metadata labels and annotations are modifiable. After the Replace request, Cloud Run will work to make the 'status' match the requested 'spec'. May provide metadata.resourceVersion to enforce update from last read for optimistic concurrency control.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /apis/run.googleapis.com/v1/{name}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /apis/run.googleapis.com/v1/{name}:cancel
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /apis/run.googleapis.com/v1/{name}:run
endpoints.description: Trigger creation of a new execution of this job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PUT /apis/serving.knative.dev/v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Replaces a service. Only the spec and metadata labels and annotations are modifiable. After the Update request, Cloud Run will work to make the 'status' match the requested 'spec'. May provide metadata.resourceVersion to enforce update from last read for optimistic concurrency control.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /apis/serving.knative.dev/v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes the provided service. This will cause the Service to stop serving traffic and will delete all associated Revisions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /apis/serving.knative.dev/v1/{parent}/routes
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /apis/serving.knative.dev/v1/{parent}/services
endpoints.description: Lists services for the given project and region.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /apis/serving.knative.dev/v1/{parent}/services
endpoints.description: Creates a new Service. Service creation will trigger a new deployment. Use GetService, and check service.status to determine if the Service is ready.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{resource}:getIamPolicy
endpoints.description: Gets the IAM Access Control policy currently in effect for the given Cloud Run service. This result does not include any inherited policies.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{resource}:setIamPolicy
endpoints.description: Sets the IAM Access control policy for the specified Service. Overwrites any existing policy.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{resource}:testIamPermissions
endpoints.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified Project. There are no permissions required for making this API call.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.
